top3.sql:
SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
ORDER BY crossing DESC, date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
ORDER BY crossing DESC, date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
ORDER BY crossing DESC, date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
AND crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE player_api_id = (
        SELECT player_api_id
        FROM Player
        WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
    )
)
ORDER BY date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing)
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    JOIN Player p2 ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
    WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  )
ORDER BY date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
ORDER BY crossing DESC, date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
ORDER BY crossing DESC, date ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing)
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    JOIN Player p2 ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
    WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  )
ORDER BY date ASC
LIMIT 1;
